strategy_description: Buy when CCI drops below -100 (oversold extreme) and exits when CCI crosses back above 0 (neutral). Short-side not traded (long-only on NSE equities). Uses go-talib CCI. Daily bars, NSE Nifty50 large-cap universe. Edge thesis: CCI oscillates faster than RSI, generating more signals per instrument per year, while ±100 thresholds still identify statistically meaningful price extremes relative to average range. Mean-reversion edge: large-caps experience temporary dislocations during market stress that self-correct.
